artPrompt: A bloated, slime-slick catfish hauled dripping from murky green water, its three milky eyes catching the dim light, whiskered barbels trailing muck, mottled scales with a toxic sheen, held upright against a shadowed reservoir backdrop in a tight landscape framing. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Three-Eyed Catfish
text: When Three-Eyed Catfish enters the battlefield, scry 2. (The third eye sees the future. The other two are just for show.)
flavorText: Caught in the reservoir, sold at the snack cart, regretted by everyone.
